headline: Academy’s a Believer in the Nike and Jordan Brands
summary: Academy Sports + Outdoors is expanding the Nike and Jordan brands to more store locations at a time when sales of running shoes are expected to rise.

headline: 36-year-old's fitness company was 'a week away' from bankruptcy—now it's valued at $10.1 billion
summary: Whoop was born from founder and CEO Will Ahmed's obsession with tracking his own fitness and recovery as a college athlete.

raw.headline: 36-year-old's fitness company was 'a week away' from bankruptcy—now it's valued at $10.1 billion
raw.summary: Whoop was born from founder and CEO Will Ahmed's obsession with tracking his own fitness and recovery as a college athlete.

headline: 143 investors said no to his wearable idea, he says—now Whoop is worth $10.1 billion
summary: Will Ahmed founded Whoop at age 22 while he was at Harvard University, with early prototypes developed out of the Harvard Innovation Labs. He was rejected by 143 investors, came within a week of bankruptcy and built a company now valued at $10.1 billion with 2.7 million members across more than 200 countries, he says.

raw.headline: 143 investors said no to his wearable idea, he says—now Whoop is worth $10.1 billion

headline: Nike and Adidas take their rivalry to the World Cup. Who will win?
summary: The brands are both at a crossroads, and their campaign centerpieces play up soccer bona fides alongside the sport’s stars and other pop icons.
